title: Piper Sandler Bumps Up Broadcom Price Target By 10.3%
text: Piper Sandler analyst Harsh Kumar raised the price target on Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ:AVGO) to $750 from $680 and reiterated an Overweight. The price target implies a 12.7% upside to December 31, 2021 closing price.
